name: Beaufort Yacht & Sailing Club
description: Come play pickleball at Beaufort Yacht & Sailing Club in Beaufort, SC! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. You can reserve the courts. A membership is required to play.

name: Belfair Court Sports
description: Come play pickleball at Belfair Court Sports in Bluffton, SC! There are 7 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, lights, and trainers or lessons. A membership is required to play.

name: Berkeley Hall Pickleball Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Berkeley Hall Pickleball Complex in Bluffton, SC! There are 4 outdoor asphalt and hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, locker rooms, and trainers or lessons. You can reserve the courts.
fees: Members only — Player must be Berkeley Hall members or member guests and must be registered.

name: Brigantine Quarters
description: Come play pickleball at Brigantine Quarters in Hilton Head Island, SC! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Reservations are not available. The courts are private.
fees: Private — Courts available to Brigantine Quarters owners and guests only.
